underlying_goal: Understand and document the Gen3 rule engine design (overlap handling, profile hot-reload, seal() pattern), then implement the seal()/private-mutation refactor and get it building and tested in CI
friction_detail: Initial commit used GCC-only bitset extensions (_Find_first/_Find_next) that broke Clang CI, and the test-data submodule reverts couldn't be fully removed from history due to branch protection.
brief_summary: User wanted to analyze the Gen3 rule engine design, document decisions, and implement the seal() refactor with passing tests; they largely succeeded though hit CI/submodule and Clang-compatibility snags that required follow-up fixes.
